raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A red flag is attached to a pole on a green patterned surface. The flag is flexible and attached to the pole at its top. STRATEGY - grasp the flag body to initiate movement, then release to allow it to wave. Failure modes include grasping the pole instead of the flag, which would prevent waving. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the flag body; Step 2 grasp the flag body for control; Step 3 release the flag to let it wave.**
Goal: any_in(flag, waving)
Scene: red_flag, pole, green_surface
Step 1: reach(red_flag)
  affordance_region: the body of the red flag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_flag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_flag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_flag)
  affordance_region: the body of the red flag
  contact: holding(red_flag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_flag)
Step 3: release(red_flag)
  affordance_region: the body of the red flag
  contact: released(red_flag) [completion]
  done_when: released(red_flag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red flag
the body of the red flag
the body of the red flag
